title: Pick the Right AI for the Job
synopsis: You are a consultant hired to choose the best AI model for five very different clients — a novelist, a coder, a journalist, a student, and a small business owner. Every choice you make has real consequences inside the story, and by the end you will have built a reusable decision framework you can apply outside it.
rationale: Teenagers are already choosing between AI tools without any framework for evaluation, making them vulnerable to hype, marketing, and benchmark manipulation rather than genuine task-fit thinking.
learning_outcome: Students can evaluate at least three AI models against a self-designed rubric for a specific task and justify their recommendation with evidence from structured testing.
source_signals: Modern-Day Oracles or Bullshit Machines? How to thrive in a ChatGPT world
Top 5 Copilot AI features for students - Microsoft
